name: Personal Website
bullets: Built a fully static personal website from scratch using plain HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript — no frameworks, no build step, no dependencies.
Designed and implemented a 12-theme system using CSS custom properties, with theme preference persisted to localStorage and applied instantly across all pages.
Built a dynamic SVG favicon that updates its color in real time to match the active theme using the CSS computed style API and base64-encoded data URIs.
Implemented a reading shelf page with real-time search, multi-axis filtering (type and status), and sortable grid rendering — all client-side with no backend.
Designed a manga card flip interaction using CSS 3D transforms (rotateY, preserve-3d, backface-visibility) that reveals the current chapter on the back face.
Styled the flip card back face with a manga panel aesthetic: radial speed lines via repeating-conic-gradient, an inner border, and the Permanent Marker font for the chapter number.

Built a localhost-only shelf editor (guarded by location.hostname) with add, edit, and delete functionality, localStorage persistence, and a one-click export that downloads a ready-to-deploy shelf-data.js file.
Used a MutationObserver with disconnect/reconnect pattern to detect grid re-renders and re-inject editor controls without causing infinite observer loops.

Implemented a contact form modal with client-side validation, Formspree integration, a book page-flip CSS animation on the submit button, and a minimum 1-second loading state for feedback consistency.
Built a PDF resume viewer modal that lazy-loads the PDF only when opened, avoiding unnecessary network requests on page load.
Added Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags across all pages for rich link previews on Discord, iMessage, Slack, and other platforms.
Created a custom 404 page that matches the site's design system, with a working theme switcher and a literary-themed error message.
Wrote a deploy script using rsync that syncs only production-relevant files to an Oracle Cloud VM, verifies the Nginx configuration, and reloads the server — all in one command.
Configured Nginx as a reverse proxy with HTTPS via Let's Encrypt (Certbot), HTTP-to-HTTPS redirect, custom 404 handling, and static file serving.
Implemented responsive design with mobile-specific breakpoints for the navigation bar, shelf grid, and resume layout.
Built the theme switcher as a TS monogram (initials) made entirely of colored CSS dot buttons arranged in CSS grid layouts — no images used.
Designed a modal contact form with a decorative mini bookshelf header built from CSS-animated elements, two glowing accent-colored lamps, and a brick wall SVG background pattern.
Used event delegation on the shelf grid to handle both card flip toggling and chapter increment/decrement controls with a single listener, avoiding stale handler accumulation across re-renders.
Structured resume data in a modular personal-website.json file designed for programmatic ingestion by a future resume-updater project that will auto-generate and tailor resumes.
